title: Penalty
doc_html:
§824. Penalty

            Whoever violates any of the provisions of this Subpart shall be fined not more than five hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.

            Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
doc_text:
§824.  Penalty
Whoever violates any of the provisions of this Subpart shall be fined not more than
five hundred dollars or imprisoned for not more than six months, or both.
Acts 2018, No. 206, §4.
